item.title: Join the GitHub Student Developer Pack in a few easy steps
item.description: The GitHub Student Developer Pack is a great way for students to get access to the tools and resources they need to succeed in the tech industry. Applying for the pack is quick and easy, and you can be up and running in no time. Here are the steps on how to apply for the GitHub Student Developer Pack: Go to the GitHub Education website. https://education.github.com and click on the “Join Global Campus” button.

item.title: Alif: Privacy Policy
item.description: Alif Privacy Policy Effective Date: 2023-11-14 No Data Collection: We do not collect any personal information, usage data, or any other data from our users. User Anonymity: Our app is designed to respect user privacy, and we do not track or store any identifiable information about our users. No Third-Party Services: We do not use any third-party services that might collect user data on our behalf. User Controls: Since we do not collect any user data, there are no user controls related to data privacy.

item.title: GitHub Student Pack: Unlock your developer potential
item.description: As a student aspiring to make a mark in the tech world, equipping yourself with the right tools and resources is crucial. The GitHub Student Developer Pack is a treasure trove of benefits designed to empower you on your journey to becoming a skilled developer. With this pack, you gain access to a vast array of free and discounted tools and services from leading companies in the industry. From IDEs and cloud computing platforms to learning resources and developer communities, the pack has everything you need to accelerate your learning and development.
